title: Use valid indices with PreparedStatement and ResultSet methods
description: PreparedStatement and ResultSet methods should be called with valid indices to prevent IndexOutOfBoundsException, which can cause the program to crash or behave unexpectedly.
recommendation: Always use valid indices when calling PreparedStatement and ResultSet methods.
impact: Preventing IndexOutOfBoundsException improves code quality and security.

checks.message: Always use valid indices when calling PreparedStatement and ResultSet methods.
